Journal Article · ACS Applied Materials & Interfaces, 11, 47730-47738

Azo Initiator Loaded Black Mesoporous Titania with Multiple Optical Energy Conversion for Synergetic Photo-Thermal-Dynamic Therapy

Meifang Wang, Yajie Zhao, Mengyu Chang, Binbin Ding, Zhiyao Hou*, and Jun Lin

DOI

Abstract

Azo initiator-loaded black mesoporous titania with multiple optical energy conversion for synergistic photo-thermal-dynamic therapy.

Highlights

  • Uses black mesoporous titania as an optical energy conversion platform.
  • Combines photo-thermal and dynamic therapy mechanisms.

Add energy-conversion and therapeutic synergy notes here.

Citation

Meifang Wang et al. Azo Initiator Loaded Black Mesoporous Titania. ACS Appl. Mater. Interfaces 2019, 11, 47730-47738.
